en.short: Synchronizes UniFi devices, sites and consoles with GLPI 11 assets.
en.long: Connects to the UniFi Site Manager Cloud API (api.ui.com) using an X-API-KEY. Syncs UniFi sites to GLPI Locations, hosts (UDM, UCG…) and devices (APs, switches, routers) to GLPI NetworkEquipment. Features an ECharts dashboard with device status and firmware overview, manual sync button, and configurable cron task.

es.short: Sincroniza dispositivos, sitios y consolas UniFi con activos de GLPI 11.
es.long: Se conecta a la API Cloud de UniFi Site Manager (api.ui.com) usando X-API-KEY. Sincroniza sitios UniFi a Ubicaciones de GLPI, hosts (UDM, UCG…) y dispositivos (APs, switches, routers) a Equipos de Red de GLPI. Incluye dashboard con ECharts, botón de sincronización manual y tarea cron configurable.
